overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic samurai game (Ghost of Tsushima), showing a character in red traditional armor traversing a moonlit forest path, ascending stone stairs, and reaching a coastal overlook at Omi Monastery. The scene features dramatic night lighting with a full moon, autumn red maple trees, and traditional Japanese stone lanterns.

events.description: character transitions from walking to running pace

agents.ego_description: samurai character runs along a forest dirt path toward stone stairs, passing traditional stone lanterns

entered.detail: tall pine trees lining the forest path
distinctive red-leaved maple tree indicating autumn season
traditional Japanese stone tōrō lanterns marking the path
narrow dirt trail through the forest
traditional wooden structure with lit window
stone steps leading upward into the mountain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a moonlit forest trail where a samurai character runs toward a mountain shrine. Traditional stone lanterns line the dirt path, and a distinctive red maple tree stands out against the dark blue night. The character approaches a set of stone stairs leading upward.

events.description: character leaves dirt path and begins ascending stone stairs

agents.ego_description: character climbs moss-covered stone stairs flanked by ornate stone lanterns

entered.detail: ancient stone steps with moss growing between cracks
large boulders covered in green moss lining the stairway
rocky mountain summit visible against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep stone stairway carved into the mountainside, flanked by moss-covered boulders and traditional stone lanterns. The sky opens up above as the climb progresses, revealing the mountain peak against the starry night.

events.description: character reaches top of stairs and coastal view becomes visible
full moon emerges from behind trees illuminating the ocean

agents.ego_description: character walks along the hilltop path as the ocean comes into view between the trees

entered.detail: moonlit ocean with waves visible in the distance
rocky cliff edge dropping down to the shoreline
scattered pine trees on the hilltop

segments.scene_description: Reaching the hilltop, the scene opens to reveal a breathtaking coastal overlook. The character walks along a dirt path as the moonlit ocean comes into view between scattered pine trees, with waves crashing against the distant shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: Omi Monastery overlook with red maple

events.description: text 'OMI MONASTERY' appears indicating location name

agents.ego_description: character approaches the monastery overlook, pausing to view the full moon over the ocean

entered.detail: bright full moon hanging over the ocean horizon
sandy beach visible along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at the Omi Monastery overlook, where a magnificent red maple tree stands prominently against the night sky. The full moon illuminates the expansive ocean view, with the coastline stretching into the distance. The scene captures the serene atmosphere of the mountaintop shrine location.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded moonlit forest trail that ascends into a sweeping coastal overlook. It begins with a samurai running along a dirt path lined with stone lanterns and vibrant red maple trees before approaching a set of steep stone stairs. As the character climbs the stairway carved into the mountainside, the dense foliage gives way to an opening sky filled with stars. The scene then expands upon reaching the hilltop, where the camera follows the character through scattered pine trees to reveal the moonlit ocean and crashing waves. Finally, the movement culminates at the Omi Monastery overlook, centering on a magnificent red maple tree set against the expansive, moon-illuminated coastline.
